arts.ttl: On this day 40 years ago: Terry Byfield joins Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Imagine getting to work just one day behind the scenes at your boyhood football club – then imagine working 14,610 of them. Both prospects unfathomable to many – but both achieved by a legendary figure at Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Eberechi Eze set for QPR reunion as Crystal Palace boss taking Carabao Cup 'very seriously'
arts.sum: Eze made more than 100 appearances for the Hoops before his move to Selhurst Park but the star could be involved against the Championship oufit

arts.ttl: Going to the game?: QPR v Crystal Palace matchday guide
arts.sum: Crystal Palace take on Championship outfit Queens Park Rangers at Loftus Road on Tuesday night (19:45 BST), seeking progression to the Carabao Cup fourth round for the first time since 2018/19.

arts.ttl: ‘Too strong’ – QPR vs Crystal Palace prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their QPR vs Crystal Palace prediction ahead of the Carabao Cup clash on Tuesday. The post ‘Too strong’ – QPR vs Crystal Palace prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Welling knocked out of FA Cup to Chatham Town - with ex Crystal Palace loanee getting the winner
arts.sum: Elliot Long combined well with TJ Bramble and fired just beyond the far post then Anointed Chukwu tried to be cheeky by slotting a free kick under the defensive wall as they jumped, but there was no power in his effort and Brad House saved comfortably. In the early stages, they were the better side, and Jack Burchell came close with an overhead effort that went wide after David Winfield headed Gene Kennedy’s corner back across the face of goal.

arts.ttl: How to watch and follow QPR v Palace LIVE – including TV details
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are in Carabao Cup third-round action when they visit Queens Park Rangers on Tuesday, 17th September (19:45 BST) – but if you can't make it to Loftus Road, there are still plenty of ways you can follow all the action LIVE.

arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Queens Park Rangers and Crystal Palace, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
